title: Structured Runtime Telemetry
purpose: Implement deterministic runtime telemetry infrastructure to eliminate invisible execution failures, establish structured operational diagnostics, and support runtime replay and execution tracing.
architectural_constraints: Telemetry uses NDJSON append-only format consistent with T20.3 event bus
All runtime operations must emit telemetry
Deterministic timestamp handling using ISO-8601 UTC
No visualization dashboards in this ticket
acceptance_criteria: All 7 telemetry categories emit structured events
Correlation IDs propagate across execution boundaries
Retention policy enforces 90-day info, 1-year warn/error, indefinite critical
Deterministic timestamps with no local time or DST ambiguity
Telemetry does not duplicate governance event bus events

failure_modes.scenario: Telemetry duplicates governance event bus events
failure_modes.mitigation: Telemetry focuses on operational metrics; governance events focus on governance actions
